title: Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Mission |prev=[[Second mission to Coruscant (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Second Mission to Coruscant]] |conc= |next=[[Mission to Dosuun]] |image= |name=Mission to Nar Shaddaa |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] {{c|[[Disciples of Ragnos crisis]]}} |objective=Destroy Racto's factory |date=[[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] |place=[[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] |result=New Republic victory |side1=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side2=[[Lannik Racto]]
([[Disciples of Ragnos]]) |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*NRI agents |ppl2=*Racto's forces |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Mission to Nar Shaddaa''' was a military operation conducted by the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. Its primary task was to shut down an illegal assassin [[Nar Shaddaa droid factory|droid factory]] commissioned by [[Lannik Racto]]. Racto sold these assassin droids on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] to criminal activities. Lannik Racto had been captured by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]], in a [[Second mission to Coruscant (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|daring mission]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Following his arrest, Racto revealed the site of his factory on Nar Shaddaa and a team of NRI agents were sent to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to shut it down. The agents infiltrated the facility and successfully completed their mission. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1stm}} {{GCW Ragnos}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nar Shaddaa (Disciples of Ragnos crisis), Mission to}} [[Category:Battles of the Disciples of Ragnos crisis]] [[Category:Missions to Nar Shaddaa]]
